hypothesis: Research-domain expansion into agent-native media generation (Open-Generative-AI repo) and community skill discovery (VoltAgent awesome-openclaw-skills) can unlock new capability tiers without premium API costs.
impact: Enable self-hosted media generation and community skill installation, reducing dependency on paid APIs by 30%.
